first_object_ahead: Which option describes the object the red-boxed robot will reach first if it moves straight ahead along the red arrow?
Choose the option for the first object in the red-boxed robot's forward path.
If the red-boxed robot continues straight along the red arrow, which option describes the object that comes first?
Which option describes the first warehouse object the red-boxed robot would encounter by moving straight forward?
Following the red-boxed robot's forward direction, which option describes the object reached first?
closest_object_to_reference: Which option describes the warehouse object closest to the {reference_object_name}?
Choose the option for the object nearest to the {reference_object_name}.
Among the candidate warehouse objects, which option is nearest to the {reference_object_name}?
Which option describes the object with the smallest distance to the {reference_object_name}?
Using ground positions, which option describes the warehouse object closest to the {reference_object_name}?
closest_object_to_robot: Which option describes the warehouse object closest to the robot?
Choose the option for the object nearest to the robot.
Among the candidate warehouse objects, which option is nearest to the robot?
Which option describes the object with the smallest distance to the robot?
Using ground positions, which option describes the warehouse object closest to the robot?

global.object_description: a perspective warehouse aisle with shelf racks, warehouse equipment, candidate objects, and a text option panel below the scene
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter
global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the selected warehouse object in the scene

task:warehouse_robot_forward_path_query.object_description: a perspective warehouse aisle with shelf racks, warehouse equipment, one red-boxed robot with a red travel-direction arrow, candidate warehouse objects, and a text option panel below the scene

query:closest_object_to_reference.object_description: a perspective warehouse aisle with shelf racks, warehouse equipment, one red sphere reference object, candidate warehouse objects, and a text option panel below the scene

query:closest_object_to_robot.object_description: a perspective warehouse aisle with shelf racks, warehouse equipment, one robot, candidate warehouse objects, and a text option panel below the scene
